allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys; content = sys.stdin.read\(\); print\(content[content.find\('colab.research'\):content.find\('colab.research'\)+2000] if 'colab.research' in content else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const c=chunks.join\(''\); const idx=c.indexOf\('colab.research'\); if\(idx>=0\) console.log\(c.slice\(idx-100, idx+3000\)\); else console.log\('NOT FOUND'\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const c=Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\); const matches = c.match\(/https?:\\/\\/[^\\s\\"'<>]*\\.\(gif|png|jpg\)/gi\); if\(matches\) console.log\([...new Set\(matches\)].join\('\\n'\)\); else console.log\('NO MATCHES'\); }\);")
